problem id: 636e0dba
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  10110011 -> 11101001
  00001110 -> 11100111
  01101110 -> 11010111
  11001110 -> 10000111
  10100000 -> 01010000
  01110011 -> 10001001
  00111001 -> 00001100
  10101101 -> 00000110
  01001110 -> 11000111

query: 00111101
predicted answer: 01001110
